title: Quick 5-minute hairstyle
summary: Simple hairstyle when there is very little time.
steps: Brush hair gently from ends upward.
Make a low ponytail or half-up style.
Smooth loose strands with hand or brush.
warnings: Do not pull hair tightly or painfully.
dontDo: do not judge face or attractiveness

title: Quick hairstyle — variants
summary: Three neutral hairstyle variants for a few minutes.
steps: Variant 1: low ponytail — brush, gather low and smooth the top.
Variant 2: half-up — gather upper hair and secure with clip or elastic.
Variant 3: loose bun — twist a ponytail, wrap it and pin it.
For short hair, smooth sides and clip one section.
For a neater finish use a small amount of smoothing cream.
Check that the hairstyle does not pull the scalp.
warnings: The hairstyle should be comfortable, not painful.

title: Sport hold
summary: A hairstyle that keeps hair away from the face while moving.
steps: Brush hair.
Make a ponytail or low bun.
Secure shorter strands with pins.
warnings: Avoid hard metal accessories if they disturb activity.

title: Sport hold — full guide
summary: Stable hairstyle for training, walking or an active day.
steps: Brush hair and separate shorter face strands.
Gather hair into a medium or low ponytail.
Twist into a bun if stronger hold is needed.
Secure ends with pins or second elastic.
Pin shorter strands flat.
Move your head and check what loosens.
warnings: Do not make the style so tight that the scalp hurts.
dontDo: do not tie wet hair very tight

title: Everyday loose hairstyle
summary: Natural hairstyle for school, work or a normal day.
steps: Brush hair.
Keep the natural parting.
Clip one strand or make a loose low ponytail.
warnings: Natural finish does not need perfect symmetry.

title: Everyday hairstyle — natural variant
summary: Neutral plan for comfortable hair without overstyling.
steps: Brush hair and set a natural parting.
If hair gets in the face, clip one side strand.
For long hair, make a loose low ponytail or half-up style.
For short hair, smooth sides and add a small clip.
For a neater effect, smooth only the top layer.
Check comfort while sitting and walking.
warnings: This is an instruction, not a beauty judgment.
dontDo: do not compare yourself to others
do not use too much product

title: Simple elegant hairstyle
summary: Neat hairstyle for a family event, meeting or ceremony.
steps: Brush hair and smooth the top.
Make a low ponytail, bun or neat half-up style.
Hide loose ends with a pin.
warnings: Elegant does not mean tight or uncomfortable.
dontDo: do not pull hair too hard

title: Elegant hairstyle — full guide
summary: A neater variant of a simple occasion hairstyle.
steps: Brush hair and smooth the top.
Gather hair low at the nape.
Make a low ponytail or twist into a low bun.
Pin ends with hair-colored pins.
Smooth flyaways with a little cream or water.
Check both sides and loosen spots that pull.
warnings: Do not use this instruction to judge face or attractiveness.

title: Soft curl arrangement
summary: Neutral way to organize curls without forceful brushing.
steps: Do not aggressively brush dry curls.
Shape strands with fingers.
Pin only the strands that disturb you.

title: Curls — gentle hairstyle
summary: Simple plan for curly or wavy hair.
steps: Refresh strands with damp hands or water mist.
Shape curls with fingers without stretching strongly.
Pin side strands with clip or pin.
For sport, make a loose high ponytail without strong pressure.
For an elegant effect, pin only the upper section.
At the end, correct single strands instead of brushing all hair.
warnings: The instruction should respect natural hair texture.
dontDo: do not compare hair to others

title: Clip hairstyle
steps: Gather part of the hair at the back.
Twist the section lightly.
Secure with a clip without pinching the scalp.
warnings: The clip should hold, not pull.
dontDo: do not use a clip that is too heavy

title: Clip — three simple variants
summary: Clip hairstyle variants for different hair lengths.
steps: Fast variant: gather upper hair and clip it.
Low variant: gather at the nape, twist and clip vertically.
Short hair variant: clip one side strand.
For a neater effect, smooth the top with a brush.
For a natural effect, leave a few loose strands.
Check that the clip does not press when moving your head.
warnings: Choose hairstyle by comfort and occasion, not face judgment.
dontDo: do not sleep with a hard clip

title: Simple hairstyle instruction
summary: Universal start when you do not know what to choose.
steps: Brush hair gently.
Choose loose, tied or half-up.
Secure strands that disturb you.
warnings: The app does not judge the person or attractiveness.

title: Universal hairstyle plan
summary: Method for choosing simple hair styling by time, occasion and accessories.
steps: If you have 5 minutes, choose ponytail, clip or half-up style.
For sport, keep hair away from the face.
For elegance, choose lower and calmer styling.
For short hair, work with parting, sides and a clip.
For curly hair, shape strands with fingers instead of aggressive brushing.
Finally check comfort, not personal appearance.
warnings: This is a neutral technical instruction, not attractiveness advice.
